name: hf-chat-pro
description: Production-grade AI chat app powered by Hugging Face

scripts.dev:ssl: npm run certs:generate && SSL_ENABLED=true CLIENT_ORIGIN=https://localhost:5173 concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.start:ssl: npm run certs:generate && SSL_ENABLED=true CLIENT_ORIGIN=https://localhost:3001 NODE_ENV=production npm run start --workspace=server
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=server && npm install --workspace=client
